query: We're at $80k ARR and churn is getting worse even though feature usage is up. Can you figure out whether this is a packaging problem, a weak customer segment, or missing recurring value and tell us what to test next?
I have an idea for automating compliance evidence for dental clinics. Is this worth pursuing, who would pay, and what wedge could beat the all-in-one practice suites?
Our three pricing tiers all convert about the same and enterprise customers keep asking for usage pricing. Redesign the value metric and give me a safe pricing experiment.
Should my profitable $20k MRR browser extension raise a seed round, stay bootstrapped, or use revenue financing? I need a milestone-based answer, not generic VC advice.
PostHog shows teams that invite a second editor retain much better. Design a product loop around collaboration and tell me how to prove it is causal before we rebuild onboarding.
Find examples of old marketplace companies that solved cold start in unusual ways and translate the underlying mechanism to a local equipment-rental product in 2026.
We sell security training per seat but usage and value follow the number of risky events. Work out better packaging, unit economics, and how to migrate customers without destroying trust.
Everyone says our AI writing assistant is cool, but nobody comes back after exporting the first document. Do we have a retention problem, a one-shot job, or no product-market fit?
We're deciding between launching for accountants, fractional CFOs, or founders. Research the actual alternatives and recommend a distribution-first beachhead.
Our founder wants streaks, scarcity banners, and a deliberately hard cancellation flow to lift subscription revenue. Give us an ethical alternative that can still improve LTV.
Rebuild the pricing page in src/app/pricing/page.tsx to match this Figma link. Keep all existing prices and copy, but make the cards responsive and accessible.
Stripe webhook retries are creating duplicate subscriptions in production. Here is the stack trace and the handler. Find the root cause and fix it with a regression test.
Review this pull request that adds annual billing. Focus on race conditions, authorization, idempotency, and whether the migration can corrupt existing subscriptions.
Write five homepage headlines for our existing payroll product. The positioning is already approved: same-day payroll corrections for restaurant groups.
Explain loss aversion and the decoy effect for my undergraduate psychology exam, with citations to the original studies.
Does our subscription cancellation flow comply with the FTC click-to-cancel rule and the EU Digital Services Act? I need legal requirements, not product recommendations.
I have $30,000 to invest personally. Compare index funds, bonds, and startup angel investments for my retirement portfolio.
The Wi-Fi drops whenever this MacBook switches from the access point in the office to the one in the hall. Diagnose the VLAN, roaming, driver, and switch configuration.
Animate the onboarding progress indicator with a restrained spring and shared-element transition. Respect prefers-reduced-motion and keep it at 60fps.
Create a three-year GAAP revenue recognition schedule for our prepaid annual contracts and explain the journal entries.
